statement: In every magma, Equation 1179 (`x = y * ((z * (y * w)) * u)`) implies Equation 838 (`x = x * ((y * x) * (z * x))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0607
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op y w)) u))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op x (op (op y x) (op z x)))
